<mxfile host="Electron" agent="seimi-render" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="seimi-arch" name="seimi-render 架构"> <mxGraphModel dx="1417" dy="829" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;" value="seimi-render 架构" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="500" x="550" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="grp_entry" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;dashed=1;" value="接入层（三种入口）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="1480" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="http" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="HTTP Server
(cpp-httplib 线程池)

POST /render
GET /result /pdf /image
GET /status
POST /cookies /proxy" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="240" x="120" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="WebSocket Server
(QWebSocketServer)

action: render / subscribe / auth
主动推送: created / finished" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="240" x="680" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="MCP Server
(cpp-mcp, 独立线程)

render_url / get_render_result
web_search / web_reader
内部 HTTP 回调 127.0.0.1:8088" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="240" x="1240" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="guard" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;align=center;" value="🔒 鉴权 / 内网防护 / 登录限流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="600" x="500" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_http_g" edge="1" parent="1" source="http" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;" target="guard"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ws_g" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="guard"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_mcp_g" edge="1" parent="1" source="mcp" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;" target="guard"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_g_q" edge="1" parent="1" source="guard" style="rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="queue"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="queue" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="RenderQueue（线程安全中枢）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="700" x="450" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="queue_body" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=10;spacingLeft=12;spacingRight=12;" value="QMutex + 两个 QWaitCondition（单锁串行化所有跨线程交互）

▸ submit(url, outputs, extract?, ...) — 任意线程入队，返回 task_id（立即）
▸ tryTakePending() — GUI 线程【非阻塞】取待渲染任务（绝不阻塞事件循环）
▸ waitForCompletion(id, timeout) — HTTP 长轮询线程阻塞等终态
▸ snapshot(id) — 持锁拷贝结果字段（html/markdown/serp_json/pdf/image）供安全读取
▸ reportSucceeded / reportFailed — GUI 线程写终态 + 唤醒等待者" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="680" x="460" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="boundary" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cc0000;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="60" y="490" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1540" y="490" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="boundary_lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#cc0000;fontStyle=1;" value="⚠ GUI 线程边界 — Chromium限制" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="840" x="380" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_q_pool" edge="1" parent="1" source="queue" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="pool"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pool" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1420" x="90" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pool_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#b85450;" value="GUI 线程事件循环 — RenderPool（N 个并发 RenderWorker，共享一个 QWebEngineProfile 复用 cookie/缓存）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="1480" x="60" y="548" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="① 新建 page
load(url)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="165" y="595" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="② loadFinished
→ settle 延时
等 JS 执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="370" y="595" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="③ 内容提取分支<br><br>搜索内容支持结构化<br>支持markdown格式<br>支持正文提取" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="170" x="565" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="④ collect()
toHtml（始终）
+ printToPdf（可选）
+ 截图（可选）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="800" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="⑤ tryFinishCollect
采集全到齐
→ reportSucceeded
→ destroyPage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="1010" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_s12" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="step2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_s23" edge="1" parent="1" source="step2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="step3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_s34" edge="1" parent="1" source="step3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="step4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_s45" edge="1" parent="1" source="step4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="step5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="concurrency" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="并发模型<br><br>• N 个 Worker，各持独立 page<br> （每任务新建，用完异步销毁）<br>• Chromium 多进程提供真正并行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="220" x="1220" y="575" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_finish_ws" edge="1" parent="1" source="step5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" target="ws"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1160" y="615" /> <mxPoint x="1180" y="615" /> <mxPoint x="1180" y="158" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl_finish" connectable="0" parent="e_finish_ws" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#82b366;align=left;" value="taskFinished 信号
→ notifyFinished 推送订阅者" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="5" y="305" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="grp_aux" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;dashed=1;" value="辅助模块（各模块自带线程安全机制）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="1480" x="60" y="770" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aux1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="CookieStore<br>登录态注入 + 加密持久化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="230" x="75" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aux2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="ProxyConfig<br>运行时代理切换" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="230" x="320" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aux3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="StealthProfile<br>指纹统一（基础特征识别规避）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="230" x="565" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aux4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="Metrics<br>累计指标（成功率/延迟分布/吞吐/域名/配置）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="230" x="810" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aux5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="html2md
HTML→Markdown 字符串级转换器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="230" x="1055" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aux6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="TokenCompare
常量时间 token 比较（防时序侧信道）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="230" x="1300" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#ccc;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1480" x="60" y="860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="图例：" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="50" x="80" y="870" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;" value="━━▶ 实线 = 请求/数据流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="150" x="130" y="872" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;" value="┄┄▶ 虚线 = 异步信号/回调/推送" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="180" x="300" y="872" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#cc0000;" value="┄┄ 红色虚线 = 线程边界（不可逾越）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="220" x="500" y="872" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;" value="🔵蓝=HTTP 🟢绿=WS 🟣紫=MCP 🟠橙=队列 🔴红=渲染池 🟡黄=安全围栏" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="500" x="740" y="872" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 414px;

div.div:
QMutex + 两个 QWaitCondition（单锁串行化所有跨线程交互）
▸ submit(url, outputs, extract?, ...) — 任意线程入队，返回 task_id（立即）
▸ tryTakePending() — GUI 线程【非阻塞】取待渲染任务（绝不阻塞事件循环）
▸ waitForCompletion(id, timeout) — HTTP 长轮询线程阻塞等终态
▸ snapshot(id) — 持锁拷贝结果字段（html/markdown/serp_json/pdf/image）供安全读取
▸ reportSucceeded / reportFailed — GUI 线程写终态 + 唤醒等待者

switch.text: QMutex + 两个 QWaitCondition（单锁串行化所有跨线程交互）...

div.div:
并发模型
• N 个 Worker，各持独立 page
（每任务新建，用完异步销毁）
• Chromium 多进程提供真正并行
